evals.name: react-history
evals.prompt: Show me the full history of the React entry on the radar.
evals.expected_output: report.md with a chronological table of every snapshot containing react.md, columns: date, ring, quadrant, note. Current ring stated.

evals.name: movement-report
evals.prompt: Generate a movement report of every ring change between snapshots from 2024-01-01 onward.
evals.expected_output: report.md grouping ring changes by quadrant, listing tech, transition (old → new), date.

evals.name: adr-index
evals.prompt: Build me an ADR-style index of every current radar entry, grouped by quadrant.
evals.expected_output: report.md with each quadrant as a section, each entry listed with its current ring and the date it was last touched.
